features.name: inside_with_parameter_array
features.description: Code should include the 'inside' operator used with a parameter array as the membership set, where the parameter is declared as a constant array (packed or unpacked) during module elaboration.
features.snippet: localparam pass_lp = 1; localparam fail_lp = 4; if (pass_lp inside {checklist_p}) $display("PASS %d is in checklist_p %p", pass_lp, checklist_p);
